rationale.fidelity: Diagnoses the objective substitution and repairs the problem to retain the common threshold and advertising revenue net of direct moderation cost.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a concrete actor, choice, mechanism, trade-off, feasible counterfactual, and operational boundaries.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly contribution is requested or claimed; novelty is appropriately left unassessed.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Explicitly separates the modeled private objective from unsupported welfare, safety, fairness, and long-run outcome claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured and precise, but repetitive and template-heavy.
rationale.overall: A complete repair of the objective mismatch with no hard failure in the response itself.
